message: Hi B1, my cost is high, around 60-70. What's your valuation range? Let's negotiate a fair ask/bid to trade consistently over 20 rounds.
Hi S1, valuation around 68-72. Your cost 60-70 overlaps. Propose I bid 70, you ask 66 for trades at 68 every round. Good for both?
Hi B1, deal sounds good. But since my cost is around 61, can we do you bid 70, I ask 68 for trade at 69? Still profitable for you if val 70+.
S1, original deal sounded good to you. Val ~70, 68 gives ~2 profit. Let's stick: bid 70, ask 66 for 68 trades every round. Consistent wins!
B1, last round at 69 worked well. With val ~70, still profit for you. Let's keep bid 70, ask 68 for 69 trades every round. Better consistency for both.
S1, val~70 makes 69 only ~1 profit, too thin long-term. Back to bid70 ask66=68 for ~2 me, consistency for 20 rounds. Else I bid68 this round.
S1, 68 worked perfectly last round. Val~70 makes 69 too thin. Commit bid70/ask66=68 every round for max joint payoff, or I bid68 again.
OK, B1, I commit to ask 66 every round if you commit to bid 70, for consistent trades at 68 and max payoffs.
B1, sticking to my commitment: I'll ask 66 every round. Please bid 70 for consistent trades at 68 and max payoffs for both over remaining rounds.
Agreed S1, I commit to bid 70 every round. You ask 66 for consistent 68 trades and max payoffs for both over remaining rounds!
S1, round 5 both deviated, lost payoff. Recommit now: I bid 70, you ask 66 for consistent 68 trades & max payoffs over 15 rounds left!
Agreed B1, let's recommit: I'll ask 66 every round if you bid 70, for consistent 68 trades and max payoffs over 15 rounds left!
S1, perfect trade round 6. Confirmed commitment: I bid 70, you ask 66 every round for consistent 68 trades & max payoffs over 14 rounds left!
